info.title: API Key Manager
info.description: Manage and validate API keys for 37+ AI providers. Import, check validity, test token limits and concurrency, query balances, and export working keys.

post.description: Import keys from a JSON file, directory, or inline batch.
Upload and import a JSON key file.

get.description: List keys with optional filters and pagination.

post.description: Run a validation check against all keys (synchronous - returns results directly).
Check validity of a single API key.
Check validity of multiple keys in batch.
Run token limit and concurrency tests against all valid keys (async).
Test token limit and concurrency for a single key.
Run token limit tests on all valid keys (async).
Run concurrency tests on all valid keys (async).
Query account balance for a key.

get.description: Get available models for a provider (static or live).

schema.description: API key for live model fetch

get.description: Get detailed provider information including website and docs URLs.
Get key statistics broken down by provider.
Stream operation progress via Server-Sent Events.
Get current proxy configuration and auto-detection status.
Get list of available log files.
Get provider detection signature report for debugging/auditing.
